title: centaurea aristata
intro: Centaurea aristata, also known as the aristate cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Centaurea aristata include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and sinusitis. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
